sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24774" key="diazwsth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δια-ζωστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n24774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twelfth vertebra in the spine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:179" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.179</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
